ddls:
CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the supplier is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "supply_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supply center associated with the supplier */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the supplier belongs to */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the supplier was registered in the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the supplier (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the supplier */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the supplier */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the supplier's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_supply_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("supply_center_id") REFERENCES supply_centers ("supply_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent industry (for hierarchical industry classification) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the industry was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the industry record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industries_parent_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supply_centers" (
  "supply_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply center */,
  "supply_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the supply center */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the supply center is located */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person at the supply center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supply center */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the supply center was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the supply center record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supply_centers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES region_data ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier for whom this contact is listed */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the contact person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the contact was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the contact record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier being evaluated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., Delivery Time, Quality Score) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., Financial, Operational) */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the metric */,
  "performance_trend" TEXT /* Trend of the metric over time (e.g., Improving, Declining) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier involved in the contract */,
  "contract_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract was signed */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the contract */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., Service, Material) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract is up for renewal */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract renewal (e.g., Pending, Approved) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the contract */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the contract was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the contract record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sourcing_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sourcing request */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier related to the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., Pending, Approved) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the sourcing request */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., Material, Service) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the requested item */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the request (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the request was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the request record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sourcing_requests_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the organization (e.g., admin, manager) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., login, update supplier) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_data" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent region (for hierarchical region classification) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's centroid */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the region was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_data_parent_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_region_id") REFERENCES region_data ("region_id")
)
